title: jurinea lithophila
intro: Jurinea lithophila, also known as Lithospermum lithophila, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Jurinea lithophila is often prepared in herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
